{
  "to": "rituraj@leewayhertz.com",
  "subject": "Re: Purchase Order LH-<REDACTED_PHONE_1> — Keysight N9020A MXA Signal Analyzer x 2",
  "body": "Hello Rituraj,

Thank you for your Purchase Order LH-<REDACTED_PHONE_7> for 2 x Keysight N9020A MXA Signal Analyzer (unit price 38,500; total 77,000), payment terms NET 30, requested ship date 12-Jun-2026, Incoterm DDP New Delhi. We noted your instruction that Ship-to is the same as on PO LH-<REDACTED_PHONE_8>.

We have created a draft sales order in our system under Salesforce Order ID 801dM00003n4zAPQAY (Order No. <REDACTED_PHONE_5>). At the moment, the N9020A line item could not be added due to a pricing setup issue (no PricebookEntry).

We are correcting this internally and will finalize the order and send the Sales Order Acknowledgement (SOA) as soon as the line item is successfully added.

If you would like us to proceed using a specific quote number, please share it so we can match it to the PO.

Best regards,
Keysight Sales Operations"
}
